lesson.title: 新概念英语 - 第1册 - 第079-080课Peggy's shopping-list佩吉的购物清单

sections.text_en: Tom: What are you doing, Peggy?Peggy: I'm making a shopping-list, Tom.Tom: What do we need?Peggy: We need a lot of things this week.Peggy: I must go to the grocer's. We haven't got much tea or coffee, and we haven't got any sugar or jam.Tom: What about vegetables?Peggy: I must go to the greengrocer's. We haven't got many tomatoes, but we've got a lot of potatoes.Peggy: I must go to the butcher's, too. We need some meat. We haven't got any meat at all.Tom: Have we got any beer and wine?Peggy: No, we haven't. And I'm not going to get any!Tom: I hope that you've got some money.Peggy: I haven't got much.Tom: Well, I haven't got much either!
vocab: shopping n. 购物 list n. 单子 vegetable n. 蔬菜 need v. 需要 hope v. 希望 thing n. 事情 money n. 钱
sections.text_cn: 汤 姆：佩奇，你在干什么？佩奇：我在写购物单，汤姆。汤 姆：我们都需要什么？佩奇：这星期我们需要很多东西。佩奇：我得去一下食品店。我们的茶叶和咖啡不多了，糖和果酱也没有了。汤 姆：蔬菜呢？佩奇：我还得到蔬菜水果店去一下。我们番茄不多了，但土豆还有不少。佩奇：我还要到肉店去一下。我们需要些肉。我们一点肉也没有了。汤 姆：我们还有啤酒和葡萄酒吗？佩奇：没有了。不过，我不打算去买！汤 姆：我希望你还有钱。佩奇：我的钱不多了。汤 姆：好吧，我也没啥钱！。
